totalBalances.description: Total sum of currentBalance (Bank) and totalBalance (Investment) values across all Bank and Investment accounts, grouped by Currency.

totalInvestmentBalances.description: Total sum of Investment Balance values across all Investment accounts, grouped by Currency.

totalBankBalances.description: Total sum of currentBalance values across all Bank accounts, grouped by Currency.

adjustmentTxnSummary.description: Sum, count and average of Refund/Adjustment/Reimbursement Income transactions, grouped by currency.

creditTxnWithoutTransferSummary.description: Sum, count, and average of all credit transactions (excluding transfers), grouped by Currency.

largeTransferOccurrences.description: For each time period, the number of times where transactions exceeded the large transaction amount, grouped by Currency.

savingsTxnSummary.description: Sum of savings transactions, grouped by currency.

depositTxnSummary.description: Sum, count, and average of all deposit transactions, grouped by Currency..

largeDepositOccurrences.description: For each time period, the number of times where transactions exceeded the large transaction amount, grouped by Currency.

negativeBalanceOccurrences.description: For each time period, the number of times where Daily Balance is less than zero, grouped by Currency.

transferTxnSummary.description: Sum, count, and average of all transfer transactions, grouped by Currency.

creditTxnWithTransferSummary.description: Sum, count, and average of all credit transactions (including transfers), grouped by Currency.

nsfOccurrences.description: For each time period, the number of times NSF has occurred, grouped by Currency.
